MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-16-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/5/06 IS CONTINUED TO 7/17/06 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER SIDE. THERE WAS NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION CONTINUED THE MATTER ON THE MOVING PAPERS. THE COURT ORDERED THAT THE PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE REGARDING NEW TRIAL DATE. AT 10AM THE PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL APPEARED WHEN COURT WAS NOT IN SESSION AND WAS INFORMED OF THE COURT'S DECISION. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. (JUDGE: ROBERT DONDERO, CLERKS: LESPY/JIROQUE, REPORTER: RITA HOWELL CSR #25421(D206)
